## [See Also](/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGEvent/data#see-also)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGEvent/data#Instance-Properties)

[`var flags: CGEventFlags`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgevent/flags)Returns the event flags of a Quartz event.[`var location: CGPoint`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgevent/location)Returns the location of a Quartz mouse event.[`var timestamp: CGEventTimestamp`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgevent/timestamp)Returns the timestamp of a Quartz event.[`var type: CGEventType`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgevent/type)Returns the event type of a Quartz event (left mouse down, for example).[`var unflippedLocation: CGPoint`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgevent/unflippedlocation)Returns the location of a Quartz mouse event.
